This workspace contains a basic Next.js todo application designed for learning purposes, especially suitable for embedded developers transitioning to web development.

## Project Overview

- **Framework**: Next.js 15 with App Router
- **Language**: JavaScript (for simplicity)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Features**: Add, delete, toggle todos with statistics

## Key Learning Concepts

- React Hooks (useState)
- Event handling and state management
- Array methods and functional programming
- Conditional rendering
- Component architecture

## Development

- Development server runs on http://localhost:3000
- Main application code is in `src/app/page.js`
- Hot reload enabled for instant feedback

## Architecture

The app uses a single component with local state management to keep it simple and educational. All todo functionality is contained in one file to make it easy to understand for beginners.
